inputs.prompt: A cinematic wide shot of a solitary girl holding a vibrant bouquet of flowers, standing in the middle of an endless snowfield. The scene is minimalistic and poetic, with soft diffused lighting under a cloudy winter sky. Snow particles drifting in the air, subtle wind movement in her hair and coat. Strong visual contrast between the colorful bouquet and the monochrome white landscape. Ultra-realistic, high resolution, fashion editorial style, dramatic composition, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field.
